meta.question: Where are the configuraton tables for the Wavfront Calibration Lookup Table located in the model?
meta.finalAnswer:
The "Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table" is located within the Alignment and Phasing System (APS) component's conceptual design. Its specific path in the model is:

TMT::Project::Work Packages::Telescope::WorkPackages::Control::Alignment and Phasing System::Systems Engineering::01 Components::Operational::APS::Conceptual Design::Configuration Tables::Wavefront Calibration Lookup Table.

It is represented in the model as both a package and a block.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Wavefront Calibration")))
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25
